name: claude-code-cost-tracker
description: Track your Claude Code API costs locally - zero config, privacy-first

claudeCostTracker.customPricing.markdownDescription: Inline pricing overrides for models not covered by the built-in Claude Opus / Sonnet and GPT pricing. Each entry: `"<model>": { "input": ..., "output": ..., "cache_write_5m": ..., "cache_write_1h": ..., "cache_read": ... }` in USD per 1M tokens. `cache_write` is still accepted as a legacy alias for `cache_write_5m`.

claudeCostTracker.spikeThresholdUsd.description: Mark assistant turns above this USD cost as spikes.
